title: Ainswei 108 Pcs Halloween Potion Bottles Set,Halloween Decorations Indoor,Apothecary Bottles with Wooden Apothecary Display Rack,Spell Lable & Pendants for Halloween Tiered Tray Party Supplies Décor
description:
About this item
Halloween Decor Potion Bottle Set: Includes 30 mini potion bottles with cork, 1 potion display wooden shelf, 30 pendants, 30 apothecary labels, 3 witch newspaper, 2 burlap twine, and 1 spider web and so on.
Create 30 Mysterious Potion Bottles: You can fill mini potion bottles with colored water. Then stick on Halloween sticker labels and hang pendants on the witch potion bottles with ropes.Finally, when you finish the whole DIY project of magic potion bottles, you can display the apothecary potion bottles in the potion shelf of your set.
Multi-functional Halloween Display Rack: You'll get a wooden shelf to show off your crystal stones, potion bottles, spell bottles, apothecary bottles, witchy potion, witchcrafts and other collectibles. In addition, you also get 3 vintage newspapers to stick on the rack for a complete potion bottle display. The wooden shelf not only can display all kinds of potion bottles, but also for decorating witch's rooms, cabinets, tables or mantelpieces, as well as every corner of Halloween.
Various Different Decorative Items: In the potion set, there are some mini decorative ornaments, such as a black cat, a witch's brewing cauldron, a tombstone, skeleton bones, spiders and spider webs etc., which can add a spooky atmosphere to your Halloween.
Gift Suitable for All Ages: This mysterious potion bottle set is perfect for creating mixies potions and pairs perfectly with a display shelf. It's a great choice for witches and magic potion enthusiasts, as well as anyone who loves DIY magical potion making. Additionally, it makes a unique decoration gift for Halloween.
reviews_5s: Used this set for a Halloween classroom party for third graders and they enjoyed it so much!!! Students got to pick out their bottle, sticker and charms. I purchased glow in the dark pigments glitter and glycerin for the potions it was such a hit!It was just what I wanted. Perfect. Would definitely purchase again.Everyone can join in
